my-workspace@
  └─ No dependents found

@workspace/logger@workspace:packages/logger
  └─ my-workspace (requires workspace:*)

@workspace/utils@workspace:packages/utils
  └─ my-workspace (requires workspace:*)

@types/bun@1.3.11
  └─ dev my-workspace (requires latest)

axios@1.14.0
  └─ @workspace/logger@workspace:packages/logger (requires ^1.9.0)

debug@4.4.3
  └─ my-workspace (requires ^4.4.3)

follow-redirects@1.15.9
  └─ axios@1.14.0 (requires ^1.15.0)

ms@2.1.3
  └─ debug@4.4.3 (requires ^2.1.3)
